sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الصِّدْقُ دِعَامَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً فِي بِنَاءِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ الْمُسْلِمَةِ، فَهُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْمُوصِلُ إِلَى كُلِّ بِرٍّ وَخَيْرٍ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost predstavlja osnovni stub u izgradnji muslimanske ličnosti, jer je to put koji vodi ka svakom dobročinstvu i hajru na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness represents a fundamental pillar in building the Muslim personality, as it is the path leading to all righteousness and goodness in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ حَثَّ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُمَّتَهُ عَلَى التِزَامِ الصِّدْقِ فِي الْأَقْوَالِ وَالْأَفْعَالِ، مُبَيِّنًا أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَأَنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, podsticao je svoj ummet na pridržavanje istine u riječima i djelima, pojašnjavajući da istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him, urged his nation to adhere to truthfulness in words and deeds, explaining that truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الْمُقَابِلِ، حَذَّرَ أَشَدَّ التَّحْذِيرِ مِنَ الْكَذِبِ، لِأَنَّهُ يَقُودُ إِلَى الْفُجُورِ الَّذِي يَنْتَهِي بِصَاحِبِهِ فِي النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Nasuprot tome, najstrožije je upozorio na laž, jer ona vodi u razvrat koji svog počinioca odvodi u vatru.
sentences.translationEn: Conversely, he warned most severely against lying, because it leads to wickedness which ends its doer in the Fire.

sentences.arabic: [أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ وَالْآدَابِ].
sentences.translation: [Zabilježio Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu, održavanju rodbinskih veza i adabima].
sentences.translationEn: [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtue, Enjoining Good Manners, and Joining of the Ties of Kinship].

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤَكِّدُ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ هُوَ مَنْزِلَةُ الْقَوْمِ الْأَعْظَمِ الَّتِي مِنْهَا تَنْشَأُ جَمِيعُ مَنَازِلِ السَّالِكِينَ، وَهُوَ صَيْقَلُ الْقُلُوبِ مِنَ النِّفَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn el-Kajjim naglašava da je istinoljubivost najveća stanica iz koje proističu sve ostale stanice onih koji teže Allahu, i ona je sredstvo za čišćenje srca od licemjerja.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim emphasizes that truthfulness is the greatest station from which all other stations of the seekers arise, and it is the polisher of hearts from hypocrisy.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَرِّيَ لِلصِّدْقِ يَجْعَلُ الْإِنْسَانَ مَكْتُوبًا عِنْدَ اللهِ صِدِّيقًا، وَهِيَ مَرْتَبَةٌ عَالِيَةٌ تَلِي مَرْتَبَةَ النُّبُوَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastojanje da se govori istina čini čovjeka upisanim kod Allaha kao 'Siddik' (istinoljubiv), što je visoki stepen koji dolazi odmah nakon vjerovjesništva.
sentences.translationEn: Seeking truthfulness causes a person to be written with Allah as a 'Siddiq' (truthful one), which is a high rank following that of prophethood.

sentences.arabic: فَالصَّادِقُ مَعَ نَفْسِهِ وَمَعَ النَّاسِ يَنْعَمُ بِرَاحَةِ الضَّمِيرِ وَثِقَةِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ، بَيْنَمَا يَعِيشُ الْكَاذِبُ فِي رِيبَةٍ وَقَلَقٍ دَائِمَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Onaj ko je iskren prema sebi i ljudima uživa u mirnoj savjesti i povjerenju društva, dok lažov živi u stalnoj sumnji i nemiru.
sentences.translationEn: One who is truthful with themselves and with people enjoys peace of conscience and the trust of society, while the liar lives in constant doubt and anxiety.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُرَبِّينَ غَرْسُ هَذِهِ الْقِيمَةِ فِي نُفُوسِ النَّاشِئَةِ لِيَكُونُوا لَبِنَاتٍ صَالِحَةً فِي بِنَاءِ الْأُمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, odgajatelji trebaju usaditi ovu vrijednost u duše mladih kako bi bili čvrsti temelji u izgradnji ummeta.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, educators should instill this value in the souls of the youth to be righteous building blocks for the nation.

sentences.arabic: وَخِتَامًا، فَإِنَّ النَّجَاةَ فِي الصِّدْقِ وَإِنْ ظَنَّ النَّاسُ غَيْرَ ذَلِكَ، فَاللهُ يَنْصُرُ مَنْ صَدَقَهُ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, spas je u istini čak i ako ljudi misle drugačije, jer Allah pomaže onoga ko je prema Njemu iskren.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, salvation lies in truth even if people think otherwise, for Allah supports the one who is truthful to Him.
